name: Karma Korma
overview: Two wives bond over recipes and revenge at a Kolkata cooking class. Shahana and Jhinuk joke about killing each other's husbands, until Jhinuk's husband actually dies. Shahana says she's done her part. Now Jhinuk must do hers. But Inspector Bhupen Bhaduri smells foul play. Murder or karma?

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Karma Korma | Sohini | Ritabhari | Ritwick C | Pratim D Gupta | 12 DEC | hoichoi
